title: podman push --delete [WIP]
body:
Addresses https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/9866

Ported some code from Skopeo for remote deletion, need to figure out the tunnels component and ?add the auth to replace skopeo global opts?, also needs a test

Signed-off-by: Parker Van Roy <ParkerVR@bu.edu>

<!--

-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ParkerVR* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **luap99** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @luap99` in a comment when ready. Closing for now as the internship ended. @ParkerVR, feel free to reopen if you want to push it over the finish line.
Started this one on my own time :^)
@ParkerVR hey, just checking if you have time to continue this. Let me know if you're ok with me taking this over.
@lsm5 sorry to hold you up on this, I’ve been away. Feel free to take over! The last part necessary here is the skopeo context needs to be rebuilt for the necessary values

Thanks for working on this, @ParkerVR!

I am closing this PR and @lsm5 can continue the work.
thanks a lot @ParkerVR . I'll continue from here.
